---
name: 🌟 Epic
about: A large body of work that contains multiple user stories / tasks
title: "[Epic]: "
labels: ["type: epic"]
---

## 🎯 Objective:
_What is the overarching goal of this Epic? What will it achieve once completed?_

## 📜 Requirements

### Scope
_Provide a description and scope of the Epic. Explain the goals, objectives, and potential benefits._

### User Stories
_List the issues or tasks that are part of this Epic. You can link to existing issues or create new ones as part of this Epic._

- [ ] User Story 1
- [ ] User Story 2
- [ ] User Story 3
- [ ] ...

### Dependencies
_Are there any dependencies that need to be resolved for this Epic to be completed?_

### Milestones
_List the major milestones that will signify the completion of different parts of the Epic._

- Milestone 1: _(description)_
- Milestone 2: _(description)_
- ...

### Definitions and acronyms
_Provide definitions of all terms, acronyms, and abbreviations that might exist to properly interpret the SDD. These definitions should be items used in the SDD that is most likely not known to the audience._

## ⏭️  Next actions

- [ ] Discuss the feasibility of the Epic
